items.title: Isaiah Evans is going to a Timberwolves team that has free agents in Bones Hyland and Jaylen Clark. Minnesota was one of the most frequent users of off ball screens, which should be a good fit for Evans.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Isaiah Evans is going to a Timberwolves team that has free agents in Bones Hyland and Jaylen Clark. Minnesota was one of the most frequent users of off ball screens, which should be a good fit for Evans.

items.title: Chris Finch on what he sees for Terrence Shannon and Jaylen Clark:
items.author: Ryan Eichten
items.body_excerpt:
Chris Finch on what he sees for Terrence Shannon and Jaylen Clark:

"It's about creating pathways for those guys to be able to play. You might say like, isn't that the coach's job? But sometimes, you know, there's a gridlock." (1/2)
